meta.title: Ky su phan mem | Van hanh he thong va giao san pham
meta.description: Trang portfolio song ngu cua Tran Tu Minh.
meta.location: TP. Ho Chi Minh, Viet Nam

hero.badge: San sang cho vi tri backend va platform
hero.tagline: Toi xay dung dich vu on dinh, giao san pham thuc dung, va giu tien do thuc thi ro rang duoi ap luc delivery.
about_paragraphs: Toi lam viec o giao diem giua backend, thiet ke he thong va trien khai san pham voi uu tien cao cho do tin cay.
Cach lam cua toi ket hop kien truc ro rang, vong lap ky luat va ket qua co the do luong cho nguoi dung va doi ngu.
hero.current_line: Trong tam hien tai: do tin cay API, tu dong hoa trien khai, va nang cao trai nghiem lap trinh vien.

impact.title: Chi so tac dong
impact.subtitle: Ket qua da do luong trong cac chu ky giao hang gan day

metrics.label: San pham va module da giao
metrics.note: Tu MVP den giai doan van hanh production

metrics.label: Do san sang quan sat duoc
metrics.note: Do tin cay dich vu trong 12 thang

metrics.label: Khoang do tre API
metrics.note: p95 cho cac endpoint giao dich thong dung

metrics.label: Giam chi phi ha tang
metrics.note: Toi uu truy van, chinh sach cache va danh gia autoscale

project.name: Nen tang van hanh thuong mai hop nhat
project.context: Quy trinh van hanh phan manh gay lech du lieu va lam cham toc do phoi hop giua cac nhom ho tro va giao nhan.
project.role: Toi phu trach quyet dinh kien truc backend, trien khai API cot loi va ke hoach rollout cung QA va ops.
bullets: Xac lap cac lop dich vu theo bounded context va API contract-first.
Ap dung dong bo su kien cho trang thai don hang va ton kho.
Bo sung dashboard quan sat runtime va playbook xu ly su co.
constraints: Di chuyen tung buoc de tranh downtime cho nhan su van hanh.
Uu tien tinh nhat quan du lieu hon do mo tinh nang o giai doan dau.
Chap nhan mot so phan trung lap ngan han de giam rui ro trien khai.
architecture: Dich vu Node.js voi PostgreSQL va cache Redis
Worker bat dong bo cho job nen co retry
He thong telemetry tap trung va dieu huong canh bao

more_work.title: Du an khac
more_work.subtitle: Mot so du an da trien khai

items.name: SLA Monitoring Hub noi bo
items.desc: Hop nhat health check va luong canh bao de giam thoi gian phat hien su co.

items.name: Cong cu cham diem rui ro release
items.desc: Tu dong kiem tra truoc release de canh bao thay doi co rui ro cao truoc cua so deploy.

items.name: Data Export Gateway
items.desc: Xay dung luong xuat du lieu an toan voi gioi han toc do chat cho doi tac.

experience.title: Kinh nghiem
experience.subtitle: Vai tro va pham vi phu trach

items.desc: Phu trach tinh nang backend, cap nhat kien truc va nang cao quy trinh ung pho su co cho nhieu san pham.
Trien khai API, thiet ke du lieu va cac du an tich hop lien phong ban voi trong tam do tin cay.
Phat trien module tinh nang, quy trinh xu ly loi va kiem tra chat luong trong doi agile.

contact.title: Lien he
contact.subtitle: San sang trao doi ve bai toan ky thuat thuc te
contact.cta: Neu ban dang xay dung san pham can do tin cay cao, toi rat san long ket noi.

footer.note: Xay dung bang HTML, CSS va JavaScript thuan.
